items.headline: Berkshire’s New CEO Makes Something Crystal Clear About Shareholder Capital
items.summary: In his first letter to shareholders as chief executive, Greg Abel did something Warren Buffett rarely did in his roughly six decades running Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-B). He drew a hard line between management and ownership of capital. “Your capital is commingled with ours, but it does not belong to us. Our role is stewardship,” Abel ...
